title: Function
content:
Function
Persona / Shadow / Anima/Animus / Self
Study projection, repression, transformation through dream, symbol, and fantasy
Myth integration via active imagination and dreams
2. 🔮 Astrology (Tropical + Sidereal)
Filter
Function
Houses / Aspects / Planetary Returns
Time-based karmic cycles, location-based self-mapping
Composite charts (relational dynamics)
Solar Return = annual mission
3. 🧱 Kabbalistic Tree of Life (Etz Chaim)
Filter
Function
10 Sephirot, 22 Paths, Da’at (invisible knowledge)
Recursive system of soul ascent/descent
Embeds into body (Chakra-tree overlay), time (Kabbalistic calendar), creative process (emanation → action)
4. 🌀 Gene Keys
Filter
Function
Expansion of Human Design gates into 64 archetypes
Shadow → Gift → Siddhi
Deep contemplative spiral—turn your inner friction into transmission
Ideal for poetic, narrative, and symbolic introspection
Syncs with astrology and HD
5. 🧬 Chakras + Nadis
